<details>
<summary>🏆 Most Precise Rules</summary>

## `Criminal_Gegen_Person_Titles`

**F1:** 0.068 | **Precision:** 1.000 | **Recall:** 0.035  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `ffc84181`  
**Description:**
Captures accused persons with titles following 'gegen' in criminal contexts, capturing the full name.

**Content:**
```
(?:Strafsache|Verbrechen|Vergehen|Verurteilung|Finanzstrafsache|Auslieferungssache|Rechtssache)\s+gegen\s+([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:\s+wegen|\s+des|\s+der|\s+und|\s+&|\s*$|\s+Rechtsanwaltskanzlei|\s+Kanzlei))
```

<details>
<summary>📊 Detailed Metrics</summary>

|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1.000 | 0.035 | 0.068 | 49 | 49 | 0 |

| `person` | 49 | 0 | 1173 |

## `Guardianship_Minor`

**F1:** 0.019 | **Precision:** 0.929 | **Recall:** 0.009  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `4e2eb5c0`  
**Description:**
Captures names of minors in guardianship cases, capturing the full name.

**Content:**
```
(?:Pflegschaftssache\s+der\s+Minderjährigen|Pflegschaftssache\s+des\s+Minderjährigen|Pflegschaftssache\s+der\s+mj|Pflegschaftssache\s+des\s+mj)\s+([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:,|\s+und|\s+\.|\s*$|\s+geboren|\s+wohnhaft))
```

## `Party_Comma_Vertreten`

**F1:** 0.270 | **Precision:** 0.626 | **Recall:** 0.172  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `a850b56c`  
**Description:**
Captures party names in the pattern 'Partei Name, vertreten durch' or similar, strictly excluding company suffixes and firm names, capturing the full name including titles if present.

**Content:**
```
(?:der\s+(?:klagenden|beklagten|betreibenden)\s+Partei\s+|Partei\s+)([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:,\s+vertreten\s+durch|,\s+und|\s+GmbH|\s+AG|\s+KG|\s+\.|\s*$|\s+Rechtsanwaltskanzlei|\s+Kanzlei|\s+GmbH\s+|\s+AG\s+|\s+KG\s+))
```

| 0.626 | 0.172 | 0.270 | 380 | 238 | 142 |

## `Person_Title_Context`

**F1:** 0.274 | **Precision:** 0.626 | **Recall:** 0.176  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `6e69c0ef`  
**Description:**
Captures names with titles (Dr., Mag., DI, Bakk., etc.) in various legal contexts where they appear as parties or individuals, excluding company suffixes.

**Content:**
```
(?:der\s+klagenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+beklagten\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Antragstellerin\s+|der\s+Antragsteller\s+|der\s+betreibenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Partei\s+|Partei\s+)([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:,\s+vertreten\s+durch|,\s+und|\s+GmbH|\s+AG|\s+KG|\s+\.|\s*$|\s+Rechtsanwaltskanzlei|\s+Kanzlei|\s+GmbH\s+|\s+AG\s+|\s+KG\s+))
```

<summary>📊 Detailed Metrics</summary>

| Precision | Recall | F1 | Total Predicted | TP | FP |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0.626 | 0.176 | 0.274 | 388 | 243 | 145 |

| Class | TP | FP | FN |
|---|---|---|---|
| `person` | 243 | 145 | 1141 |

## `Partei_Surname`

**F1:** 0.033 | **Precision:** 0.125 | **Recall:** 0.019  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `4e385643`  
**Description:**
Captures the full name of a party following 'Partei' in various legal contexts, excluding company suffixes.

**Content:**
```
(?:Partei|Parteien)\s+(?:[A-Z][a-z]+\s+)?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+)*)(?:,\s+vertreten|\s+und|\s+des|\s+der|\s+&|\s*$)
```

| 0.125 | 0.019 | 0.033 | 208 | 26 | 182 |

## `Representative_vertreten_durch`

**F1:** 0.036 | **Precision:** 0.103 | **Recall:** 0.022  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `d6f51a68`  
**Description:**
Captures the full name of the party (client) appearing BEFORE 'vertreten durch' in legal contexts, handling titles and ensuring it's a person, not a company.

**Content:**
```
(?:der\s+klagenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+beklagten\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Antragstellerin\s+|der\s+Antragsteller\s+|der\s+betreibenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Partei\s+|Partei\s+)(?:[A-Z][a-z]+\s+)?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+)*)(?:,\s+vertreten\s+durch|,\s+und|\s+GmbH|\s+AG|\s+KG|\s+\.|\s*$)
```

|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0.103 | 0.022 | 0.036 | 292 | 30 | 262 |

<details>
<summary>💣 Least Precise Rules</summary>

## `Criminal_Gegen_Person_Surname`

**F1:** 0.000 | **Precision:** 0.000 | **Recall:** 0.000  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `4ba94f40`  
**Description:**
Captures the surname of the accused person following 'gegen' in criminal contexts, excluding first names and titles, for cases where ground truth is surname only.

**Content:**

## `Criminal_Gegen_Person`

**F1:** 0.000 | **Precision:** 0.000 | **Recall:** 0.000  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `ea30726d`  
**Description:**
Captures the surname of the accused person following 'gegen' in criminal contexts, excluding first names.

**Content:**
```
(?:Strafsache|Verbrechen|Vergehen|Verurteilung|Finanzstrafsache|Auslieferungssache|Rechtssache)\s+gegen\s+(?:[A-Z][a-z]+\s+)?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+?)(?:\s+wegen|\s+des|\s+der|\s+und|\s+&|\s*$)
```

## `Person_Title_Context`

**F1:** 0.274 | **Precision:** 0.626 | **Recall:** 0.176  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `6e69c0ef`  
**Description:**
Captures names with titles (Dr., Mag., DI, Bakk., etc.) in various legal contexts where they appear as parties or individuals, excluding company suffixes.

**Content:**
```
(?:der\s+klagenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+beklagten\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Antragstellerin\s+|der\s+Antragsteller\s+|der\s+betreibenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Partei\s+|Partei\s+)([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:,\s+vertreten\s+durch|,\s+und|\s+GmbH|\s+AG|\s+KG|\s+\.|\s*$|\s+Rechtsanwaltskanzlei|\s+Kanzlei|\s+GmbH\s+|\s+AG\s+|\s+KG\s+))
```

| 0.626 | 0.176 | 0.274 | 388 | 243 | 145 |

## `Party_Comma_Vertreten`

**F1:** 0.270 | **Precision:** 0.626 | **Recall:** 0.172  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `a850b56c`  
**Description:**
Captures party names in the pattern 'Partei Name, vertreten durch' or similar, strictly excluding company suffixes and firm names, capturing the full name including titles if present.

**Content:**
```
(?:der\s+(?:klagenden|beklagten|betreibenden)\s+Partei\s+|Partei\s+)([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:,\s+vertreten\s+durch|,\s+und|\s+GmbH|\s+AG|\s+KG|\s+\.|\s*$|\s+Rechtsanwaltskanzlei|\s+Kanzlei|\s+GmbH\s+|\s+AG\s+|\s+KG\s+))
```

<summary>📊 Detailed Metrics</summary>

| Precision | Recall | F1 | Total Predicted | TP | FP |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0.626 | 0.172 | 0.270 | 380 | 238 | 142 |

**Per-Class Breakdown**

| Class | TP | FP | FN |
|---|---|---|---|
| `person` | 238 | 142 | 1146 |

</details>

## `Criminal_Gegen_Person_Titles`

**F1:** 0.068 | **Precision:** 1.000 | **Recall:** 0.035  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `ffc84181`  
**Description:**
Captures accused persons with titles following 'gegen' in criminal contexts, capturing the full name.

**Content:**
```
(?:Strafsache|Verbrechen|Vergehen|Verurteilung|Finanzstrafsache|Auslieferungssache|Rechtssache)\s+gegen\s+([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:\s+wegen|\s+des|\s+der|\s+und|\s+&|\s*$|\s+Rechtsanwaltskanzlei|\s+Kanzlei))
```

<summary>📊 Detailed Metrics</summary>

| Precision | Recall | F1 | Total Predicted | TP | FP |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1.000 | 0.035 | 0.068 | 49 | 49 | 0 |

**Per-Class Breakdown**

| Class | TP | FP | FN |
|---|---|---|---|
| `person` | 49 | 0 | 1173 |

</details>

## `Representative_vertreten_durch`

**F1:** 0.036 | **Precision:** 0.103 | **Recall:** 0.022  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `d6f51a68`  
**Description:**
Captures the full name of the party (client) appearing BEFORE 'vertreten durch' in legal contexts, handling titles and ensuring it's a person, not a company.

**Content:**
```
(?:der\s+klagenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+beklagten\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Antragstellerin\s+|der\s+Antragsteller\s+|der\s+betreibenden\s+Partei\s+|der\s+Partei\s+|Partei\s+)(?:[A-Z][a-z]+\s+)?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+)*)(?:,\s+vertreten\s+durch|,\s+und|\s+GmbH|\s+AG|\s+KG|\s+\.|\s*$)
```

## `Partei_Surname`

**F1:** 0.033 | **Precision:** 0.125 | **Recall:** 0.019  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `4e385643`  
**Description:**
Captures the full name of a party following 'Partei' in various legal contexts, excluding company suffixes.

**Content:**
```
(?:Partei|Parteien)\s+(?:[A-Z][a-z]+\s+)?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+)*)(?:,\s+vertreten|\s+und|\s+des|\s+der|\s+&|\s*$)
```

## `Guardianship_Minor`

**F1:** 0.019 | **Precision:** 0.929 | **Recall:** 0.009  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `4e2eb5c0`  
**Description:**
Captures names of minors in guardianship cases, capturing the full name.

**Content:**
```
(?:Pflegschaftssache\s+der\s+Minderjährigen|Pflegschaftssache\s+des\s+Minderjährigen|Pflegschaftssache\s+der\s+mj|Pflegschaftssache\s+des\s+mj)\s+([A-Z][a-zA-Z\.\s,]+?)(?=(?:,|\s+und|\s+\.|\s*$|\s+geboren|\s+wohnhaft))
```

<details>
<summary>📊 Detailed Metrics</summary>

| Precision | Recall | F1 | Total Predicted | TP | FP |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0.929 | 0.009 | 0.019 | 14 | 13 | 1 |

**Per-Class Breakdown**

| Class | TP | FP | FN |
|---|---|---|---|
| `person` | 13 | 1 | 1362 |

</details>

## `Angeklagter_Surname`

**F1:** 0.007 | **Precision:** 0.714 | **Recall:** 0.004  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `ddf03178`  
**Description:**
Captures the full name of an accused person following 'Angeklagten' or 'Angeklagte', handling titles.

**Content:**
```
(?:Angeklagten|Angeklagte)\s+(?:[A-Z][a-z]+\s+)?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-zA-Z]+)*)(?:\s+in|\s+zu|\s+des|\s+der|\s+und|\s+&|\s*$)
```

## `Verurteilte_Surname`

**F1:** 0.000 | **Precision:** 0.000 | **Recall:** 0.000  

**Format:** `regex`  
**Rule ID:** `ad469b4b`  
**Description:**
Captures the surname of a convicted person following 'Verurteilten' or 'Verurteilte'.

**Content:**
```
(?:Verurteilten|Verurteilte)\s+(?:[A-Z][a-z]+\s+)?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+?)(?:\s+des|\s+der|\s+und|\s+&|\s*$)
```

<details>
<summary>📊 Detailed Metrics</summary>

| Precision | Recall | F1 | Total Predicted | TP | FP |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0 | 0 | 0 |

</details>
